__rationale__: Triggering fixture for WR-25: For lentivirus packaging, use HEK293T at 70–90 % confluence; co-transfect transfer + psPAX2 + pMD2.G; collect supernatant 48–72 h post-transfection.

construct.notes: T-405 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage; Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations.
